response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, backend, mobile, and embedded systems, with strong fundamentals in TDD, testing, and developer tooling. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry infrastructure at scale, or statistical analysis — the core focus of this Principal/IC6 Growth role. Experience at Sociomantic with high-throughput systems is relevant, but there is no evidence of principal-level architectural leadership across multiple teams or measurement platform ownership.
strengths: 13+ years of engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, JS, C/C++, Java, DLang)
Strong testing/TDD culture with workshop and teaching experience, plus high-throughput systems work at Sociomantic
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work aligns with AI-first engineering velocity preference
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems
Lacks evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical/bias-detection experience required for the role
No clear track record of Principal/IC6-level cross-team architectural leadership at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Broad full-stack and high-throughput systems background
Insufficient evidence of principal-level multi-team leadership
